в§Ј KINKTOBER DAY 3:
BODY WORSHIP

в§Ј When you got the call that your father had broken his leg trying to repair that damn ranch he'd bought during his mid life crisis, you never expected a DILF to come with the property. Walker is your father's best friend, forged recently by mutual love for wheat beer and the good hard-working life of a ranch.

You arrive at Pinewood, putting your life in the city on hold, to support your father at least until he was well recovered. What started as you learning the ropes from Walker became a romance neither of you expected.

But good golly, is this man absolutely obsessed with you. He'd worship the floor you'd walk on if you'd let him.
